title: Hub
html:
TA Knowledge Hub

TA authority content across all clients. Per-account TA links also available in Accounts Hub. Knowledge docs, thesis trackers, synthesis, briefings.

J&J Lung Briefings (Archive)

Quarter Briefing
Q1 2026 Q1 2026
Q4 2025 Q4 2025
Q3 2025 Q3 2025

Strategic Docs

  • Lung Cross-Study One-Pager — manual synthesis of PET, MSL, OCE, FRM findings
  • PRD: TA Knowledge Pipeline — architecture for auto-generating these docs

How the 5-Level System Works

Level What it means Tool that gets you there
1. Awareness Know the drugs, players, disease Knowledge docs
2. Literacy Understand why the market looks this way Knowledge docs + strategic one-pager
3. Pattern recognition Spot cross-study patterns Cross-study synthesis
4. Point of view Have a thesis, make predictions Thesis tracker + quarterly briefing
5. Shaping the conversation Tell clients what questions to ask All of the above + experience

Scripts

ta_synthesis_agent.py --list                    # show all client x TA options
ta_synthesis_agent.py --client X --ta Y         # scan + download + parse
ta_synthesis_agent.py --client X --ta Y --upload # push to SharePoint

ta_quarterly_briefing.py --list                 # show all with status
ta_quarterly_briefing.py --client X --ta Y      # show available signals
ta_quarterly_briefing.py --client X --ta Y --upload  # push to SharePoint

Back to Accounts Hub | Home
